properties.name: subnetArn
properties.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the subnet

properties.name: vpcId
properties.description: The ID of the VPC the subnet is in

properties.name: state
properties.description: The current state of the subnet

properties.name: cidrBlock
properties.description: The IPv4 CIDR block assigned to the subnet

properties.name: availabilityZone
properties.description: The Availability Zone of the subnet

properties.name: availabilityZoneId
properties.description: The AZ ID of the subnet

properties.name: availableIpAddressCount
properties.description: The number of unused private IPv4 addresses in the subnet

properties.name: defaultForAz
properties.description: Indicates whether this is the default subnet for the Availability Zone

properties.name: mapPublicIpOnLaunch
properties.description: Indicates whether instances launched in this subnet receive a public IPv4 address

properties.name: ownerId
properties.description: The ID of the AWS account that owns the subnet

properties.name: tags
properties.description: Any tags assigned to the subnet
